title: Facial Treatments at Navi Skincare (Up to 41% Off). Seven Options Available.
highlights: HydraDermabrasion facials gently exfoliate the skin using a nano-technology tip, while infusing the skin with beneficial products and improving overall hydration
Benefits of diamond peel facial: aims to reduce skin discoloration and brighten the skin tone
Benefits of brightening facial: basic facial helps restore a dewy, smooth complexion, as well as reduce hyperpigmentation and add a glow to the complexion
Benefits of microneedling: treatment designed to reduce the visibility of fine lines and to provide a glow and brightening effect
Benefits of skin-tightening facial: aims to stimulate collagen production and to provide a lifting effect

Benefits of oily acne facial: noninvasive facial treatment helps remove imperfections such as blemishes or acne scarring, purify the complexion, smooth out the skin, unclog pores, and reduce sebum secretion
Korean tissue facial includes a hand massage to balance face shape tightening and stimulate circulation

faqs.question: What facial treatment options are available at Navi Skincare?
faqs.answer: Navi Skincare offers seven facial treatment options: One Hydradermabrasion Facial, One Diamond Peel Facial, One Whitening Brightening Facial, One Microneedling Facial, One Skin-Tightening Facial, One Oily Acne Facial, and One Lymphatic Drainage.

faqs.question: Where is Navi Skincare located in LA, CA?
faqs.answer: Navi Skincare is located at 200 S. Oxford Ave in the Koreatown neighborhood of Los Angeles, CA 90004. The facility is situated inside a nail salon.

faqs.question: Does Navi Skincare assess your skin before beginning a facial treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, the facial treatment at Navi Skincare includes a skin analysis to assess the customer's specific skin needs before the service begins. This step has been confirmed by multiple customers across independent reviews.

faqs.question: What should customers expect during the Facial Treatments at Navi Skincare in terms of communication?
faqs.answer: The esthetician at Navi Skincare explains each step of the facial process while performing the treatment. This has been confirmed by multiple independent customer reviewers.

faqs.question: Which Navi Skincare facial is suited for oily or acne-prone skin?
faqs.answer: Navi Skincare offers a dedicated Oily Acne Facial specifically designed for customers with oily or acne-prone skin. This is one of seven facial treatment options available at the Koreatown location.

faqs.question: What facial options does Navi Skincare offer for skin rejuvenation or anti-aging concerns?
faqs.answer: For customers focused on skin rejuvenation or anti-aging, Navi Skincare offers the Microneedling Facial and the Skin-Tightening Facial as targeted treatment options. The Hydradermabrasion Facial and Diamond Peel Facial may also address skin renewal concerns.

images.quality_assessment: Moderate quality with quantity concerns. 34 total images provided, but alt_texts reveal significant issues: many alt texts are generic ('Facial Treatments at Navi Skincare (Up to 41% Off). Seven Options Available. - Image 2') or irrelevant to the deal (competitors like 'Up to 55% Off on Facial - Chosen by Customer at Beauty Street NYC', 'Up to 65% Off Couples Massage at 27 Tai JI Spa'). Only 5-6 alt texts are contextually relevant to Navi's actual services, suggesting poor image curation and optimization.

reviews.text:
My experience was so nice and I feel relaxed. Navi was so professional and friendly. 
Do not hesitate to book. Great deal and awesome experience.
reviews.author: Groupon

reviews.text: Exceed my expectations, I got the skin tightening and it had more packed into the service than I expected.
reviews.author: Guest

reviews.text: Both Tammy and Rosey were kind and welcoming. I will visit again.
